rows.label: qev060606_MSG0001
rows.name:
Tch, why are they all so
stubborn... Mission this, mission
that... it's super annoying...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0002
rows.name:
Oh... you're from before! How
did it go after that? Did you
manage to get a Gorkwa?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0003
qev060606_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Wait, what's wrong? Looking at
me with that dumbfounded face. Is
there something different about me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev060606_SEL0011
rows.name: Point out that his speech pattern has changed.

rows.label: qev060606_JNK0020
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev060606_SEL0021
rows.name: Express concern about his argument with Trachlo Rishiron.

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0005
rows.name:
While you were out fetching the
Gorkwa, I grew into an adult.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Hey, don't be so surprised.
Unlike Earthlings, our childhood
phase is super short.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0007
rows.name:
Just as you told me, I wandered around
NLA every day and talked to all sorts
of people, and I ended up like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0008
rows.name:
Well, just as Trachlo-san says, I might
be a heretic as a Zaruboggan, but I
actually really like myself this way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0009
rows.name:
Besides, from now on, the Zaruboggan have
to survive in this city too. Things won't
go well if we just stay the same as before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0010
rows.name:
*Sigh*... I'd really appreciate it
if Trachlo-san and the others could
understand that part, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0011
rows.name:
...No, you see, lately the other Zaruboggan keep
saying that I'm making a fool out of Golbogga,
or that I'm taking revoltanting lightly...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0012
rows.name:
Are you worried about me? Man, you're the
only one who understands me like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0013
rows.name:
What happened earlier isn't
just with Trachlo-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0014
rows.name:
The other Zaruboggan keep saying that
I'm making a fool out of Golbogga, or
that I'm taking revoltanting lightly...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0015
rows.name:
They kind of treat me like a nuisance,
you know? Isn't that cruel? Values
differ from person to person, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0016
rows.name:
Arsenican is basically my parent, you
know? And yet when I try to talk to him,
he acts all distant and goes away...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_JNK0030
rows.name: Sympathize

rows.label: qev060606_SEL0031
rows.name: Sympathize with Orleron's position.

rows.label: qev060606_JNK0040
rows.name: Criticize

rows.label: qev060606_SEL0041
rows.name: Criticize Orleron's way of life.

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0017
rows.name: Right, right!! You really get it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0018
rows.name:
Well, from a Zaruboggan perspective,
they probably don't have much sense
of being a parent anyway.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0019
rows.name:
But still, they don't have to
blatantly treat me like an outcast...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0020
rows.name:
Tch... You could at least
take my side a little.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0021
rows.name:
I mean, I'm a Zaruboggan too. I
can at least imagine what everyone
is so displeased about.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0022
rows.name:
But still, they don't have to blatantly
treat me like an outcast, do they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0023
rows.name:
I like everyone too, you know.
And yet they tell me they can't
think of me as a comrade...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0024
rows.name:
...What the heck am I supposed to do?
Hey, how would you deal with your
comrades in a situation like this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_JNK0050
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev060606_SEL0051
rows.name: Advise him to do what they desire.

rows.label: qev060606_JNK0060
rows.name: Stay Silent

rows.label: qev060606_SEL0061
rows.name: Prompt him to think for himself.

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0025
rows.name:
What Trachlo-san... What the
Zaruboggan desire of me... huh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0026
rows.name: Hmmm... Let's see...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0027
rows.name:
Well, yeah... I have to figure out
the important things on my own.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0028
rows.name:
If I don't, I'll be no different
from the Zaruboggan who constantly
rely on Golbogga for everything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0029
rows.name: Hmmm... Let's see...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0030
rows.name:
...I don't care about the mission or
whatever, but maybe I'll put a little
effort in and do some revoltanting![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0031
rows.name:
Hey, I have a little favor to ask. Could you take
me to that highly contaminated area in Kurogane
no Tairiku that everyone's rumoring about?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0032
rows.name:
I'm going to go there, revoltant it, and
prove Trachlo-san and the others wrong![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0033
rows.name:
Including you getting the Gorkwa for me,
I'll be sure to reward you properly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0034
rows.name:
Right? I'm counting on you!
Because things feel really
awful if I leave it like this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0035
rows.name:
Whoa! So this is the rumored
contaminated area! Heheh... I guess
I really am a Zaruboggan after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0036
rows.name:
Seeing this much Voltant...
It's making my body ache![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0037
rows.name:
Alright! Let's revoltant it right
away! Using this Gorkwa you gave me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0038
rows.name:
Ohhh!! Here it comes! The wave is...
surging through my entire body!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0039
rows.name:
Aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaahhhh!
Uwah! Oh, Golbogga...!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0040
rows.name:
*Pant*, *pant*... That was
incredible... the Voltant here...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0041
rows.name:
It was completely impossible to revoltant
all of it, but I should have been able
to purify it to some extent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0042
rows.name:
With this, I should have slightly
fulfilled the Zaruboggan's mission
of purifying all foul things, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_JNK0070
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev060606_SEL0071
rows.name: Confidently tell him that he surely fulfilled it.

rows.label: qev060606_JNK0080
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev060606_SEL0081
rows.name: Honestly admit that it's a world you don't understand.

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0043
rows.name:
Thanks! Hearing you say
that is really reassuring.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0044
rows.name:
In that case, I'll go report
this to Trachlo-san right away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0045
rows.name:
...Hmm, in Earthling terms,
is it like I managed to find
my "Lifepoint" or something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0046
rows.name:
Well... Trachlo-san will surely understand!
I'll go report this right away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0047
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0048
rows.name: ...Orleron? Whatever is the matter?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0049
rows.name:
Trachlo-san! I revoltant'ed that
contaminated area in Kurogane no Tairiku
everyone was talking about, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0050
rows.name:
How about that? I'm a
proper Zaruboggan too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0051
rows.name:
Kurogane no Tairiku!? Going
to such a dangerous place...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0052
rows.name:
[ST:playername ] was with me too, so it's fine. More
importantly, with this... won't you
acknowledge me as a comrade?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0053
rows.name: Just for that, you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0054
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0055
rows.name:
...I am certain Golbogga would also
praise that resolve of yours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0056
rows.name:
So please return to NLA immediately.
We cannot afford to lose a
precious comrade right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0057
rows.name:
Heheh... Okay! Leader! I'll bring
this Voltant back as a souvenir![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0058
rows.name:
Thanks! I managed to prove Trachlo-san
wrong... and got acknowledged as a
comrade! This is all thanks to you too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev000601_JNK0090
rows.name: Encourage

rows.label: qev000601_SEL0091
rows.name: Cheer him on to continue working hard on his mission as a Zaruboggan.

rows.label: qev000601_JNK0100
rows.name: Warn

rows.label: qev000601_SEL0101
rows.name: Sternly warn him to be extremely careful handling the souvenir.

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0059
rows.name:
I also like living freely like
an Earthling, you know. Well,
I'll do my best in moderation![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0060
rows.name:
I know, I know! This stuff is
poison to Earthlings, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0061
rows.name:
I wouldn't do anything to hurt the
people I love so much either![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060606_MSG0062
rows.name:
...Well then, I'm going to head out
ahead. I've got to hurry and bring
this souvenir to everyone, after all![ST:wait ]
